hyperedges.label: 完整分析流程
hyperedges.desc: 从4个分析师到研究员到交易员到3个风控再到组合经理的完整工作流

hyperedges.label: 后台采集层
hyperedges.desc: 定时采集市场/公告/政策/舆情数据并写入知识库

hyperedges.label: 知识消费体系
hyperedges.desc: ContextAssembly节点在运行开始时自动装配历史知识，包含置信度标签

hyperedges.label: 结构化输出
hyperedges.desc: 三个决策智能体使用Pydantic模型进行结构化输出

hyperedges.label: 状态管理
hyperedges.desc: 辩论状态和智能体状态在图中传播
Bull and Bear researchers debate investment thesis, ResearchManager evaluates and produces investment plan
Three risk analysts debate trader's plan, PortfolioManager synthesizes final decision
All tools that generate reports fed into agent state for debate
Guosen-specific data tools not available in akshare/yfinance
Manager agents use with_structured_output with graceful fallback to free-text
Long-term memory: memory log for decisions/reflections, position state for current holdings, knowledge context for KB
Shared 5-tier rating vocabulary used by both managers and stored in memory log
Prompt construction helpers imported by manager agents

hyperedges.label: 通知与外部集成测试组
三层组合架构 (接入层+治理层+分析引擎层)
数字金融团队组织架构 (8部门17岗位)
五层知识库架构 (数据缓存+向量检索+执行追踪+知识图谱+技能文档)
知识消费双通道 (Wiki被动发现 + MCP主动查询)
GEPA学习循环 (观察→评估→提取→提炼→技能文档)
TradingAgents V1.2 核心系统 (双层调度+LLM Planner+模板系统+13Agent+知识库)
实施路线图 Phase 1-5 (基础搭建→动态管道→预算治理→学习循环→扩展)
